name: zen-browser
title: Zen Browser
description: Search and open tabs from bookmarks and history in Zen Browser on Linux.
author: domainus

commands.name: new-tab
commands.title: New Zen Tab
commands.description: Search or enter a URL and open it in Zen Browser

commands.name: new-window
commands.title: New Zen Window
commands.description: Open a new Zen Browser window

commands.name: new-private-window
commands.title: New Zen Private Window
commands.description: Open a new private Zen Browser window

commands.name: open-workspace
commands.title: Open Zen Workspace
commands.description: List Zen workspaces from your profile

commands.name: focus-zen-window
commands.title: Focus Zen Window
commands.description: List and focus visible Zen Browser windows

preferences.name: zenCommand
preferences.title: Zen Command
preferences.description: Command used to launch Zen Browser

preferences.name: searchEngine
preferences.title: Search Engine
preferences.description: Search engine for New Zen Tab

scripts.pretest: tsc --outDir dist --module commonjs --target ES2022 --jsx react-jsx --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck src/lib.ts
